name: 3M CO
business: 3M is a diversified technology company with three business segments: Safety and Industrial, Transportation and Electronics, and Consumer. Its products include industrial abrasives, adhesives, tapes, personal safety equipment, electronics materials, and consumer goods. 3M sells through direct sales, wholesalers, retailers, jobbers, distributors, and dealers globally.

catalysts.sentence: 3M completed its exit of PFAS manufacturing at the end of 2025.
In February 2026, 3M's Board of Directors declared a first-quarter 2026 dividend of $0.78 per share, an increase of 7 percent.
